trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 62.5 in the ideal bullish momentum zone (55–70), confirmed MACD crossover and rising histogram, price extended above SMA-20 — clean setup in risk-on tape.
Score 95 with RSI 61.1 in bullish zone, all momentum signals aligned, and crypto-adjacent names tend to outperform in risk-on sessions with NASDAQ leading.
Score 95 with RSI 67.6 near top of bullish zone, MACD and histogram both confirming — lower price per share allows fuller allocation within position-size limits.

decisions.briefing: Markets are clearly risk-on with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 posting solid gains, giving us confidence to deploy idle cash. I'm adding POWL, MARA, and OWL — all three sit at the top of the screener with RSI in the clean 55–70 bullish momentum zone rather than overbought territory, making them higher-quality entries than the score-75 crowd. Existing positions are held; nothing is near stop-loss.

market_education.summary_en: Equities rallied broadly on May 5 as easing trade-war concerns and resilient corporate earnings boosted risk appetite, with tech and growth names leading the charge. The NASDAQ outpaced the S&P 500, suggesting investors rotated back into higher-beta growth stocks after weeks of defensiveness. Reduced Treasury yield pressure also helped, as softer forward-guidance from the Fed allowed duration-sensitive sectors to re-rate higher.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於5月5日全面上漲，主因貿易緊張局勢緩解及企業財報優於預期，帶動風險偏好回升。納斯達克指數領漲，反映市場資金重新流入高Beta成長股。聯儲局偏鴿派的前景指引令長端利率壓力紓緩，利率敏感板塊亦隨之估值修復。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock has been moving up or down on a scale of 0–100. A reading between 55 and 70 is often called the 'bullish momentum zone' — strong enough to show real buying interest, but not so high that the stock is overbought and at risk of snapping back. Today's top picks (POWL, MARA, OWL) all sit in this sweet spot, which is why they ranked highest despite many other candidates being technically 'stronger' but dangerously extended above 70.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）以0至100的範圍衡量股價漲跌速度。RSI介於55至70之間，通常被稱為「看漲動能區間」——升勢足夠強勁，顯示有真實買盤支撐，但尚未進入超買區域（>70），短期回調風險較低。今日首選的POWL、MARA、OWL均處於此區間，雖然部分候選股技術指標數字更高，但RSI超過70意味著短期風險上升，反而降低了吸引力。
